member.name: T:Notification.Maui.MauiNotificationManager
member.summary: Renders notifications on .NET MAUI platforms using CommunityToolkit Snackbar and Toast.

member.name: M:Notification.Maui.MauiNotificationManager.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Notification.Maui.MauiNotificationManager.#ctor(Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration,Notification.Core.INotificationEventService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified configuration and event service.
member.param: The notification configuration.
The event service used to raise lifecycle events.

member.name: M:Notification.Maui.MauiNotificationManager.Show(Notification.Core.NotificationRequest)
member.summary: Displays the specified notification as a Snackbar or Toast.
member.param: The notification request to display.
member.returns: The unique identifier of the displayed notification.

member.name: M:Notification.Maui.MauiNotificationManager.Dismiss(System.Guid)
member.summary: Dismisses the notification with the specified identifier.
member.param: The identifier of the notification to dismiss.

member.name: M:Notification.Maui.MauiNotificationManager.DismissAll
member.summary: Dismisses all currently active notifications.

member.name: T:Notification.Maui.MauiNotificationServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for registering MAUI notification services.

member.name: M:Notification.Maui.MauiNotificationServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMauiNotifications(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration})
member.summary: Registers the MAUI notification manager and core notification services.
member.param: The service collection to add the services to.
An optional delegate to configure the notification settings.
member.returns: The same service collection instance for chaining.

member.name: M:Notification.Maui.MauiNotificationServiceCollectionExtensions.UseMauiNotifications(Microsoft.Maui.Hosting.MauiAppBuilder,System.Action{Notification.Core.INotificationConfiguration})
member.summary: Registers the MAUI notification services on the application builder.
member.param: The MAUI application builder.
An optional delegate to configure the notification settings.
member.returns: The same application builder instance for chaining.

member.name: T:Notification.Maui.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_DatePicker.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.DatePicker,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not
